notableEvents.label: Error-assisted runs
notableEvents.detail: Vinnie Pasquantino reaches on a fielder's choice, fielded by first baseman Matt Olson. Maikel Garcia scores. Fielding error by first baseman Matt Olson.

notableEvents.label: Lane Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Lane Thomas flies out to right fielder Ronald Acuña Jr.

notableEvents.label: Walk-off loss
notableEvents.detail: Dominic Smith hits a grand slam (1) to right center field. Eli White scores. Ozzie Albies scores. Michael Harris II scores.

notableEvents.label: Drake Baldwin GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, third baseman Maikel Garcia to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Ronald Acuña Jr. out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.

notableEvents.detail: Drake Baldwin grounds into a double play, second baseman Jonathan India to shortstop Bobby Witt Jr. to first baseman Vinnie Pasquantino. Ronald Acuña Jr. out at 2nd. Drake Baldwin out at 1st.
